prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of TGT stock, I used typical daily volatility of large-cap retail stocks (~2% daily standard deviation). The point estimate assumes no directional bias for such a short timeframe. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with widening ranges for higher confidence levels, reflecting the inherent uncertainty in short-term stock price movements.
